choices.text: Inherit OpenZeppelin: contract MyToken is ERC20, Ownable { constructor() ERC20("Name", "SYM") Ownable(msg.sender) {} ... } — audited, conventional, gets all standard functions free. Don't reinvent token contracts.
CREATE2: address = keccak256(0xff, deployer, salt, bytecode). Deterministic; same inputs always produce same address. Used for counterfactual contracts, meta-tx, deployable predictions.
